title: scariola brevirostris
intro: Scariola brevirostris, also known as the Lesser Cudweed or Scabiosa, is a perennial plant belonging to the aster family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Scariola brevirostris include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Scariola brevirostris can be made into teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
